package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for savepoint_or_nested_tx_logic_scattered_without_dedicated_helper: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Nested transaction or savepoint control scattered across services and repositories.
type CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperModel
}

type CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperService struct {
    repo *CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelper(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperDTO) error {
    return db.Transaction(func(tx *gorm.DB) error {
        if err := tx.WithContext(ctx).Save(&CaseSavepointOrNestedTxLogicScatteredWithoutDedicatedHelperModel{ID: input}).Error; err != nil {
            return err
        }
        return nil
    })
}
